name: application_date
label: Application Date
hint: Select filing date

name: application_type
label: Application Type
hint: Select applicant category

name: legal_entity_type
label: Legal Entity Type
hint: Enter entity type such as Pvt Ltd, LLP, LLC, Corporation, or Partnership Firm

name: incorporation_state
label: State / Country of Incorporation
hint: Enter state or country of incorporation/formation

name: trademark_type
label: Trademark Type
hint: Select type of mark

name: series_mark
label: Series Mark
hint: Is this application for a series of closely resembling marks?

name: mark_name
label: Trademark / Mark Name
hint: Enter mark name or literal element

name: logo_upload
label: Upload Logo / Representation
hint: Upload image, representation, or sound notation where applicable

name: mark_description
label: Mark Description
hint: Describe the logo, shape, or sound mark in detail

name: contains_non_english
label: Contains Non-English / Non-Latin Elements
hint: Enable if the mark contains foreign words or non-Latin script

name: translation_text
label: Translation / Transliteration
hint: Provide translation and transliteration of foreign or non-Latin text appearing in the mark

name: color_claimed
label: Color Claimed as Distinctive Feature
hint: Enable if protection is sought for specific colors used in the mark

name: color_description
label: Color Description
hint: Describe the specific colors claimed and how they appear in the mark

name: associated_marks
label: Associated Marks / Prior Registration Numbers
hint: Enter details of similar or associated marks already owned by the applicant

name: disclaimers
label: Disclaimers
hint: State any words, symbols, or generic elements over which exclusive rights are not claimed

name: trademark_class
label: Trademark Class (Nice Classification)
hint: Enter class number (1-45)

name: multi_class
label: Multiple Classes
hint: Is application for multiple classes?

name: goods_services_description
label: Goods/Services Description
hint: Describe goods/services in detail

name: user_claim
label: User Claim Type
hint: Select usage status

name: first_use_date
label: First Use Date
hint: Select first use date

name: usage_description
label: Usage Description
hint: Explain how the mark is used in business

name: priority_claimed
label: Priority Claimed
hint: Is priority claimed from foreign application?

name: priority_details
label: Priority Details
hint: Enter country, application number, and priority filing date

name: priority_upload
label: Priority Document Upload
hint: Upload foreign filing receipt, certificate, or convention document

name: agent_details
label: Trademark Agent Details
hint: Enter agent/attorney details

name: power_of_attorney
label: Power of Attorney Uploaded
hint: Is POA submitted?

name: msme_or_startup_certificate
label: Startup/MSME Certificate
hint: For fee concession eligibility

name: government_fee
label: Government Fee
hint: Enter filing fee

name: declaration
label: Declaration
hint: Applicant declaration of ownership
